SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST ATTY. IAN P. WILSON FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-03-2022. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2022 -- APPEARANCES BY STEVEN R. JACOBSEN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF ELIZA AGUILAR AND ERIC CHAVARIN; IAN WILSON, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT JASON RAGUAL -- ASSIGNED TO JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON JAN-24-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 220, JUDGE KATHLEEN A KELLY. PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO CONTACT DEPT. 220 BY E-MAIL BY 4:00 PM TODAY AND THE CLERK'S PHONE NUMBER WAS ALSO PROVIDED. THE COURT ACCEPTED AS TIMELY PLAINTIFF'S CCP 170.6 PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE AGAINST JUDGE MASSULLO. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 EACH, PAYABLE BY MAR-03-2022, ARE IMPOSED ON ATTY. IAN P. WILSON AND ATTY. STEVEN R. JACOBSEN FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ARE SET ON MAR-4-2022 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. OSC WILL BE DISCHARGED IF SANCTIONS ARE PAID PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
MINUTES FOR FEB-10-2022 10:30 AM

JURY TRIAL SET FOR FEB-10-2022 CONTINUED TO JUL-11-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 220 FOR JURY TRIAL. THE COURT ORDERS COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER ON THE FOLLOWING JOINT TIME ESTIMATES; MOTIONS IN LIMINE (COUNSEL TO PREPARE BINDER WITH MOTIONS AND OPPOSITIONS (ONLY MOTIONS COUNSEL CANNOT AGREE ON)); EXHIBITS; VERDICT FORM; QUESTIONNAIRE; COURT TRIAL OR JURY TRIAL; JOINT JURY INSTRUCTIONS; AND AUDIO/VIDEO/IT TECH. COUNSEL TO CONTACT COURT'S MEDIATION CALENDAR OFFICER ELIZABETH KELBER. COUNSEL TO NOTICE THE COURT WITH MSC DATE VIA EMAIL BY MARCH 11, 2022. COUNSEL TO PREPARE PRE-TRIAL ORDER FROM TODAY'S HEARING AND SUBMIT SAID ORDER TO THE COURT VIA EMAIL AT DEPARTMENT220@SFTC.ORG AND JSENGMANY@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: HONORABLE KATHLEEN KELLY; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, NOV-05-2020 HEARING HELD RE: DEFENDANT JASON RAGUAL'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DEMAND FOR IDENTIFICATION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS. THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF ERIC CHAVARIN IS TO SERVE RESPONSES (OBJECTIONS WAIVED) ON DEFENDANT JASON RAGUAL BY 12/7/20. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF ERIC CHAVARIN IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,080.00 TOTAL FOR ALL THREE MOTIONS TO COMPEL ON CALENDAR TODAY. THOSE SANCTIONS ARE TO BE PAID PRIOR TO THE CONCLUSION OF THIS CASE. DEFENSE COUNSEL IS TO PREPARE AND EMAIL A PROPOSED ORDER TO PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND THEN EMAIL THE APPROVED ORDER DIRECTLY TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT RKANE1089@AOL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT KANE; CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED (302/JPT)

Defendants Lyft Inc And Krishna Thapas Amended Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-09-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Defendants Lyft Inc and Krishna Thapa's Motion For Terminating Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

No opposition to the motion was filed. Proof having been made to the satisfaction of the court that plaintiff Eric Chaavarin had notice of this court's March 12, 2021 order, that his attorney of record approved that order as to form, that plaintiff Eric Chaavarin did not comply with the March 12, 2021 order, and, based on all papers on file in this matter, good cause appearing, the motion of defendants Lyft, Inc., and Krishna Thapas for terminating sanctions is granted.

Court to review the proposed order submitted by the prevailing party.

Judge Pro Tem: Sigrid Irias; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported.

Order is signed.

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Nov-05-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. STEVEN R. JACOBSEN, Esq. of Law Offices of Steven R. Jacobsen (Tel: 510-465-1500) appearing for plaintiffs Eliza Aguilar and Eric Chavarin;
Atty. BETH HURLEY, Esq. of Santa Cruz, Cannon & Kothary (Tel: 619-744-6835) for Defendant Jason Ragual;
Atty. SALAYHA GHOURY, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (Tel: 415-262-8594) for Defendants Lyft, Inc. and Krishna Thapa.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JASON RAGUAL'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES.

All parties stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and all counsel authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court rules as follows: Defendant's motion to compel is granted. Plaintiff Eric Chavarin is to serve responses (objections waived) on defendant Jason Ragual by 12/7/20. Sanctions are awarded against plaintiff Eric Chavarin in the amount of $1,080.00 total for all three motions to compel on calendar today. Those sanctions are to be paid prior to the conclusion of this case. Defense counsel is to prepare and email a proposed order to plaintiffs' counsel for approval as to form and then email the approved order directly to the Judge Pro Tem at rkane1089@aol.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported (302/JPT)
